parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>20. <BIBL><TITLE>Falckeisische Bibel</TITLE> noch gantz neu in <FORMAT>Schweins-leder</FORMAT> gebunden, à <PRIZE>12. Gulden</PRIZE></BIBL>, oder gegen einem neuen <BIBL><TITLE>Corpore Juris</TITLE>, <PLACE>Leipziger Edition</PLACE></BIBL>, zu vertauschen.</ITEM>
parsed.explanation: Moved the closing </BIBL> tag in the second entry to exclude the phrase ', zu vertauschen.', which is part of the sentence structure (the action of exchanging) rather than the bibliographic description of the book. Corrected the text encoding artifact '\u221a\u2020' to 'à' (indicating price/rate).
